scripts.eval:phase7: pnpm --filter @martin/contracts build && pnpm --filter @martin/core build && pnpm build && node dist/phase7-report.js
scripts.eval:phase12: pnpm --filter @martin/contracts build && pnpm --filter @martin/core build && pnpm build && node dist/phase12-report.js
scripts.eval:providers: pnpm --filter @martin/contracts build && pnpm --filter @martin/core build && pnpm --filter @martin/adapters build && pnpm build && node dist/provider-path-report.js
